title: rosa canina subvar. vacciniifolia
intro: Rosa canina subvar. vacciniifolia is a variant of the wild rose plant, also known as the dog rose, which is a flowering shrub native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina subvar. vacciniifolia include its high content of vitamins A and C, flavonoids, and essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina subvar. vacciniifolia include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
